name: Borsht - Cabbage/Beet Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs Bone-In Meat or marrow bones
Fresh Lemon Juice (or frozen lemon juice)
recipeInstructions: This hearty, sweet and sour meat soup is perfect as a main dish. Adjust the seasonings to taste. Place the meat and bones in an 8-12 quart stock pot. Add canned tomatoes and cover with water; bring to a boil. Prepare the vegetables: slice the beets and carrots, leave other veggies whole. Once boiling, skim off any impurities. Add the beets, carrots, garlic, and remaining vegetables. Reduce heat to a simmer and keep the lid slightly ajar. After about an hour, add minced garlic and sugar (e.g., Sweet 'n' Low). Adjust amounts according to preference. The soup should have a rich, sweet and sour flavor. Before serving, break up any lumps of meat and stir it back into the soup.
